pdg_node.informal_desc: Constructs a pure Riemannian Manifold HMC transition kernel from a target log-density oracle and metric/tensor oracle. The produced kernel is expected to thread immutable sampler state explicitly (e.g., position, momentum, mass/metric tensor, and PRNGKey) as state_in -> state_out.

declaration.name: buildrmhmctransitionkernel
declaration.docstring: Constructs a pure Riemannian Manifold HMC transition kernel from a target log-density oracle and metric/tensor oracle. The produced kernel is expected to thread immutable sampler state explicitly (e.g., position, momentum, mass/metric tensor, and PRNGKey) as state_in -> state_out.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Geometry-Conditioned Stochastic State Transition Factory. Constructs a higher-order transition operator by combining a differentiable scalar-field oracle with a position-dependent tensor oracle on the same continuous space. The produced operator maps an explicit immutable state (coordinates, auxiliary momentum-like variables, geometry context, and random seed) to a new state by simulating curvature-aware Hamiltonian flow and applying an acceptance correction that preserves a target invariant distribution. This yields a composable one-step Markov update with no side effects.. Applications: Bayesian inverse estimation in PDE-based material or flow models with highly anisotropic parameter geometry., Latent-state inference for nonlinear biological network models where local uncertainty curvature varies across state space., Probabilistic calibration of robotic mechanism parameters on constrained configuration manifolds., High-dimensional uncertainty sampling for geospatial field reconstruction in climate or environmental modeling.
